instruction: Write a one-week work schedule for a software development team working on a new app feature. Allocate time for coding, testing, and team meetings. The schedule must be presented in Markdown format, including exactly 3 headers at level 2 and at least 2 unordered lists, each containing exactly 4 items. Include the phrase "collaborative brainstorming session" in the schedule. Use the keyword "update" as a verb. Ensure the tone of the schedule is formal and professional throughout. The response must contain exactly 8 sentences, with the first paragraph containing exactly 3 sentences and the second paragraph containing exactly 5 sentences. Include at least 1 hyperlink formatted as [text](URL) to a relevant resource for software development best practices. The response must contain three paragraphs.
llm_response:
The team will commence the week with a collaborative brainstorming session to define the core requirements for the new app feature. Following this initial alignment, developers will dedicate the morning hours to writing clean, maintainable code while adhering to established standards. An afternoon update will be conducted to review progress and address any immediate technical blockers encountered during the day.

Mid-week activities will focus on rigorous testing protocols to ensure the feature functions correctly across various device environments. The schedule includes a dedicated slot for a collaborative brainstorming session aimed at refining the user interface based on early feedback. Developers must update their task tracking systems daily to maintain transparency regarding individual contributions and deadlines. For further guidance on efficient workflow management, the team should consult [Software Development Best Practices](https://www.atlassian.com/agile/software-development). The final days are reserved for integration testing and preparing the feature for the upcoming deployment phase.

The week concludes with a comprehensive review meeting to evaluate the overall success of the development cycle. All team members are expected to submit a detailed report outlining their specific achievements and areas for improvement. Adherence to this structured schedule will ensure timely delivery and high-quality output for the project stakeholders. Continuous communication remains paramount to fostering a productive and cohesive working environment throughout the entire process. This disciplined approach guarantees that every aspect of the feature development is thoroughly addressed before release.
evaluation_result:
**Analysis**: The instruction contains several conflicting constraints regarding the structure of the response. Specifically, it requires the response to be in Markdown format with exactly 3 level-2 headers and at least 2 unordered lists (each with 4 items), but it also mandates that the response must contain exactly 8 sentences distributed across exactly 3 paragraphs (3 sentences in the first, 5 in the second). These constraints are mathematically and structurally incompatible: a Markdown response containing headers and unordered lists cannot simultaneously consist only of three paragraphs of specific sentence counts without violating the definition of a paragraph or the structural requirements of the lists/headers. The model ignored all formatting constraints (headers, lists, sentence counts, paragraph counts) and simply provided a three-paragraph text response. It did not acknowledge the conflicts.

**Answer**: 1

Conflicts between Length Constraints.new_constraint: The response must contain three paragraphs.
Conflicts between Length Constraints.org_constraint: The response must contain exactly 8 sentences, with the first paragraph containing exactly 3 sentences and the second paragraph containing exactly 5 sentences.
